requirement_topic.en: Ecuador Grid Connection for BESS — 60 Hz System, ARCERNNR Authorization, and Distribution Company Technical Approval
requirement_topic.zh: 厄瓜多尔BESS并网——60 Hz系统、ARCERNNR授权及配电公司技术审批
requirement_topic.zht: 厄瓜多BESS併網——60 Hz系統、ARCERNNR授權及配電公司技術審批

summary.en: ARCERNNR (Agencia de Regulación y Control de Energía y Recursos Naturales No Renovables, formerly ARCONEL) is Ecuador's energy regulator and the authority responsible for authorizing electricity generation, storage, and distribution projects. All grid-connected BESS installations in Ecuador require ARCERNNR authorization as well as technical approval from the relevant distribution company — primarily CNEL EP (Corporación Nacional de Electricidad), which serves most of the country, or EEQ (Empresa Eléctrica Quito) for the Quito service area. Ecuador's electricity grid operates at 60 Hz and uses 120/240 V single-phase (residential) and 120/208 V or 277/480 V three-phase (commercial and industrial) — this is fundamentally different from China's 50 Hz, 220/380 V grid. ARCERNNR storage and microgeneration regulation is evolving, with Resolution ARCERNNR-002/2023 covering distributed generation and storage. BESS power conversion systems (PCS) must be designed, configured, validated, and independently tested for Ecuador's 60 Hz grid. Chinese BESS PCS units configured and type-tested for China's 50 Hz grid cannot be directly deployed in Ecuador without full reconfiguration and retesting.
summary.zh: ARCERNNR（厄瓜多尔能源和非可再生自然资源监管控制机构，原ARCONEL）是厄瓜多尔能源监管机构，负责授权发电、储能和配电项目。厄瓜多尔所有并网BESS装置均须取得ARCERNNR授权，以及相关配电公司的技术审批——主要是服务全国大部分地区的CNEL EP（国家电力公司），或基多服务区的EEQ（基多电力公司）。厄瓜多尔电网以60 Hz运行，采用120/240 V单相（住宅）和120/208 V或277/480 V三相（商业及工业）——与中国50 Hz、220/380 V电网有本质区别。ARCERNNR储能和微型发电法规持续演进，ARCERNNR-002/2023号决议涵盖分布式发电和储能。BESS储能变流器（PCS）须针对厄瓜多尔60 Hz电网进行设计、配置、验证和独立测试。针对中国50 Hz电网配置和型式测试的中国BESS PCS设备，未经全面重新配置和重新测试，不得直接用于厄瓜多尔。
summary.zht: ARCERNNR（厄瓜多能源和非可再生自然資源監管控制機構，原ARCONEL）是厄瓜多能源監管機構，負責授權發電、儲能和配電項目。厄瓜多所有併網BESS裝置均須取得ARCERNNR授權，以及相關配電公司的技術審批——主要是服務全國大部分地區的CNEL EP（國家電力公司），或基多服務區的EEQ（基多電力公司）。厄瓜多電網以60 Hz運行，採用120/240 V單相（住宅）和120/208 V或277/480 V三相（商業及工業）——與中國50 Hz、220/380 V電網有本質區別。ARCERNNR儲能和微型發電法規持續演進，ARCERNNR-002/2023號決議涵蓋分散式發電和儲能。BESS儲能變流器（PCS）須針對厄瓜多60 Hz電網進行設計、配置、驗證和獨立測試。針對中國50 Hz電網配置和型式測試的中國BESS PCS設備，未經全面重新配置和重新測試，不得直接用於厄瓜多。

standards_or_laws: ARCERNNR Resolution ARCERNNR-002/2023 — distributed generation and storage regulation (Ecuador)
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
Ecuador grid parameters: 60 Hz, 120/240 V single-phase, 120/208 V or 277/480 V three-phase (commercial/industrial)

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase). This is fundamentally incompatible with Ecuador's 60 Hz, 120/240 V grid. PCS firmware, protection relay settings, anti-islanding parameters, reactive power control curves, and frequency ride-through settings configured and certified for China's 50 Hz, 220/380 V grid must be comprehensively reconfigured and independently retested before deployment on Ecuador's 60 Hz grid. This is not a minor adjustment — it affects core power electronics behavior and protection system operation.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2023（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）。这与厄瓜多尔60 Hz、120/240 V电网存在本质差异。针对中国50 Hz、220/380 V电网配置和认证的PCS固件、保护继电器设置、防孤岛参数、无功功率控制曲线和频率穿越设置，在用于厄瓜多尔60 Hz电网前，须进行全面重新配置和独立重新测试。这不是小幅调整——它影响核心电力电子器件行为和保护系统运行。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2023（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）。這與厄瓜多60 Hz、120/240 V電網存在本質差異。針對中國50 Hz、220/380 V電網配置和認證的PCS韌體、保護繼電器設定、防孤島參數、無功功率控制曲線和頻率穿越設定，在用於厄瓜多60 Hz電網前，須進行全面重新配置和獨立重新測試。這不是小幅調整——它影響核心電力電子器件行為和保護系統運行。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems; 50 Hz-based)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network; 50 Hz-based)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters; 50 Hz-based)

gap.en: Critical gap: Ecuador's grid is 60 Hz and 120/240 V — not 50 Hz and 220/380 V. This is the single most important technical difference for Chinese BESS exporters. Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy Ecuador's ARCERNNR authorization requirements or CNEL/EEQ distribution company technical approval. Key technical differences requiring attention: (a) grid frequency — Ecuador is 60 Hz; China is 50 Hz. PCS power electronics, control algorithms, transformer design, filter design, and protection relay frequency settings are fundamentally different. A PCS tested and certified for 50 Hz cannot be directly used at 60 Hz without engineering redesign, firmware reconfiguration, and independent retesting; (b) grid voltage — Ecuador residential is 120/240 V; commercial/industrial three-phase is 120/208 V or 277/480 V. China is 220/380 V. Protection voltage thresholds, transformer ratios, and insulation coordination must be reconfigured; (c) ARCERNNR project authorization — engage ARCERNNR at the earliest project stage to obtain storage project authorization before equipment procurement; (d) distribution company approval — obtain CNEL EP or relevant utility's grid-connection technical requirements before equipment design is finalized; (e) IEC 62933 series evidence — where project specifications reference IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2, prepare test and design documentation accordingly; Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (f) Ecuador faced severe electricity shortfalls from drought-hit hydro capacity — BESS projects may face expedited regulatory review, but technical compliance requirements remain the same.
gap.zh: 关键差距：厄瓜多尔电网为60 Hz、120/240 V——而非50 Hz、220/380 V。这是中国BESS出口商面临的最重要技术差异。中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足厄瓜多尔ARCERNNR授权要求或CNEL/EEQ配电公司技术审批。需注意的主要技术差异：（a）电网频率——厄瓜多尔为60 Hz，中国为50 Hz。PCS电力电子器件、控制算法、变压器设计、滤波器设计和保护继电器频率设置存在本质差异。经50 Hz测试认证的PCS不经工程重新设计、固件重新配置和独立重新测试，不能直接用于60 Hz；（b）电网电压——厄瓜多尔住宅为120/240 V，商业/工业三相为120/208 V或277/480 V，中国为220/380 V。保护电压阈值、变压器匝数比和绝缘配合须重新配置；（c）ARCERNNR项目授权——在设备采购前，应在项目最早阶段与ARCERNNR接触以获取储能项目授权；（d）配电公司审批——在设备设计最终确定前，取得CNEL EP或相关电力公司的并网技术要求；（e）IEC 62933系列证据——若项目规格引用IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2，须相应准备测试和设计文件；中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（f）厄瓜多尔因水力发电能力受旱灾影响而面临严重电力短缺——BESS项目可能面临加急监管审查，但技术合规要求保持不变。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：厄瓜多電網為60 Hz、120/240 V——而非50 Hz、220/380 V。這是中國BESS出口商面臨的最重要技術差異。中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足厄瓜多ARCERNNR授權要求或CNEL/EEQ配電公司技術審批。需注意的主要技術差異：（a）電網頻率——厄瓜多為60 Hz，中國為50 Hz。PCS電力電子器件、控制算法、變壓器設計、濾波器設計和保護繼電器頻率設定存在本質差異。經50 Hz測試認證的PCS不經工程重新設計、韌體重新配置和獨立重新測試，不能直接用於60 Hz；（b）電網電壓——厄瓜多住宅為120/240 V，商業/工業三相為120/208 V或277/480 V，中國為220/380 V。保護電壓閾值、變壓器匝數比和絕緣配合須重新配置；（c）ARCERNNR項目授權——在設備採購前，應在項目最早階段與ARCERNNR接觸以獲取儲能項目授權；（d）配電公司審批——在設備設計最終確定前，取得CNEL EP或相關電力公司的併網技術要求；（e）IEC 62933系列證據——若項目規格引用IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2，須相應準備測試和設計文件；中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（f）厄瓜多因水力發電能力受旱災影響而面臨嚴重電力短缺——BESS項目可能面臨加急監管審查，但技術合規要求保持不變。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ARCERNNR authorization and distribution company (CNEL EP / EEQ) technical approval are required for all grid-connected BESS in Ecuador; 60 Hz grid configuration is a non-negotiable technical requirement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558-2023 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; 50 Hz-based certificates are not transferable to Ecuador's 60 Hz grid

source.publisher: ARCERNNR — Agencia de Regulación y Control de Energía y Recursos Naturales No Renovables (Ecuador)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy Ecuador's ARCERNNR authorization requirements or CNEL/EEQ distribution company technical approval. Ecuador operates at 60 Hz and 120/240 V — BESS PCS firmware, protection settings, anti-islanding logic, and transformer design must be comprehensively reconfigured and independently retested for Ecuador's 60 Hz grid. This is a real engineering gap, not a paperwork gap. Engage ARCERNNR and the relevant distribution company at the earliest project stage to determine authorization requirements, grid-connection technical specifications, and applicable IEC 62933 evidence requirements before equipment procurement is finalized.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足厄瓜多尔ARCERNNR授权要求或CNEL/EEQ配电公司技术审批。厄瓜多尔采用60 Hz、120/240 V运行——BESS PCS固件、保护设置、防孤岛逻辑和变压器设计须针对厄瓜多尔60 Hz电网进行全面重新配置和独立重新测试。这是真实的工程差距，不仅仅是文件差距。在设备采购最终确定前，应在项目最早阶段与ARCERNNR及相关配电公司接触，确定授权要求、并网技术规格及适用IEC 62933证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足厄瓜多ARCERNNR授權要求或CNEL/EEQ配電公司技術審批。厄瓜多採用60 Hz、120/240 V運行——BESS PCS韌體、保護設定、防孤島邏輯和變壓器設計須針對厄瓜多60 Hz電網進行全面重新配置和獨立重新測試。這是真實的工程差距，不僅僅是文件差距。在設備採購最終確定前，應在項目最早階段與ARCERNNR及相關配電公司接觸，確定授權要求、併網技術規格及適用IEC 62933證據要求。
